chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Criminal Revision Application No.56 of 2024 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF THE JUDGE 1. For order on office objection at A 2. For hearing of main case 24.05.2024 Mr. Abdullah Bhatti, Advocate for the Applicant Ms. Rubina Qadir, Addl. P.G. ------------------------- It is contended by the learned counsel for the applicant that the learned trial Court has adjourned the very case to an indefinite period till the decision of the High Court on the point of jurisdiction vide order dated 17.10.2022, which the applicant has sought to be recalled by making an application, which is not being decided by the learned trial Court for years together. By contending so, he was fair enough to say he would not press the disposal of the instant Crl. Revision Application before this Court on merits, provided the learned trial Court is directed to dispose of the above-said application of the applicant within a reasonable time, which is not opposed by learned Addl. P.G for the State. Under the discussed circumstances, the learned trial Court is directed to dispose of the above-said application of the applicant as per law, within two months, after receipt of a copy of this order. The instant Crl. Revision Application is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E

Revision Application is disposed of accordingly.
